title: NovelTools project JSON
description: Schema for noveltools.json (or custom project file). Paths are relative to the directory containing this file. Each chapter is a folder; optional scenes list gives custom order (otherwise .md files are discovered alphabetically).

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters. Each chapter is a folder: either a folder path (string) or an object with required folder, optional title, and optional scenes (custom order).

oneOf.description: Folder path; .md files inside are discovered in alphabetical order.

title.description: Optional chapter title (defaults to folder name).

folder.description: Folder path relative to project file directory.

scenes.description: Optional. Scene filenames (or paths relative to folder) in custom order. When present, only these scenes are used, in this order.

sceneStatus.description: Maps scene path (relative, forward slashes) to status. Icons: drafted (🟡), revision (🔵), review (🟠), done (🟢), spiked (🔴), cut (⚫).

synopsis.description: One-line synopsis for the scene, shown as subtitle in sidebar.

setting.description: Location or setting where the scene takes place.

timeline.description: Timeline position (date, time, or narrative marker).

tags.description: Custom tags for filtering and categorization.

sceneMetadata.description: Per-scene metadata keyed by relative path (forward slashes).

wordCountTarget.description: Target word count for the manuscript. Status bar shows progress toward this goal.

characters.description: Named characters in the manuscript. Used for POV autocomplete and reference tracking.

locations.description: Named locations in the manuscript. Used for setting autocomplete and reference tracking.

excludeStatuses.description: Scene statuses to exclude from compiled output.

includeTitle.description: Whether to include a title page heading.

sceneBreak.description: Separator between scenes within a chapter.

chapterBreak.description: How chapters are separated: 'heading' (## heading) or 'pageBreak' (HTML page-break div).

compileProfiles.description: Saved compile profiles with formatting and filter settings.
